This is a list of all reactors useable by the Controller.
{| class="sortable fandom-table"
|+Reactors (Useable by Controller)
!
!Reactor
!Cost
!Weight
!Required Tech Level
!Other Requirements
!Max Energy Level
!Recharge Rate
!Defensive Merit
|-
|[[File:Ion.jpg|50x50px|link=Ion]]
|[[Ion]]
|4266 credits
|20
|1
|none
|300
|100
|800
|-
|[[File:Ionv2.jpg|50x50px|link=Ion V2]]
|[[Ion V2]]
|8816 credits
|25
|5
|none
|400
|150
|1150
|-
|[[File:Ionflux.jpg|50x50px|link=Ion Flux]]
|[[Ion Flux]]
|15000 credits
|30
|10
|none
|500
|200
|1500
|-
|[[File:Ionfluxplus.jpg|50x50px|link=Ion Flux Plus]]
|[[Ion Flux Plus]]
|22816 credits
|35
|15
|none
|600
|250
|1850
|-
|[[File:Subnuclear.jpg|50x50px|link=Sub-Nuclear]]
|[[Sub-Nuclear]]
|35266 credits
|50
|20
|none
|800
|300
|2300
|-
|[[File:Nuclear.jpg|50x50px|link=Nuclear]]
|[[Nuclear]]
|46816 credits
|60
|25
|none
|900
|350
|2650
|-
|[[File:Quantum.jpg|50x50px|link=Quantum]]
|[[Quantum]]
|60000 credits
|60
|25
|none
|3000
|0
|3000
|-
|[[File:Bionuclear.jpg|50x50px|link=Bio-Nuclear]]
|[[Bio-Nuclear]]
|60000 credits
|70
|30
|none
|1000
|400
|3000
|-
|[[File:Crix80didron.jpg|50x50px|link=Crix80 Didron]]
|[[Crix80 Didron]]
|81666 credit value
found
|80
|0
|none
|1000
|650
|2500
|-
|[[File:Hydroncore.jpg|50x50px|link=Hydron Core]]
|[[Hydron Core]]
|93750 credits
|100
|40
|none
|1500
|450
|3750
|-
|[[File:Hydroncoremkii.jpg|50x50px|link=Hydron Core Mk. II]]
|[[Hydron Core Mk. II|Hyrdon Core Mk. II]]
|120416 credits
|120
|45
|none
|1750
|500
|4250
|-
|[[File:Cobalthydron.jpg|50x50px|link=Cobalt Hydron]]
|[[Cobalt Hydron]]
|220416 credits
|150
|50
|none
|2000
|750
|5750
|-
|[[File:Quantumsyncron.jpg|50x50px|link=Quantum Syncron]]
|[[Quantum Syncron]]
|240000 credits
|120
|50
|none
|6000
|0
|6000
|-
|[[File:Magmatic.jpg|50x50px|link=Magmatic]]
|[[Magmatic]]
|260416 credits
|80
|55
|[[Magma Technology]]
|2500
|750
|6250
|-
|[[File:Tribolthydron.jpg|50x50px|link=Tribolt Hydron]]
|[[Tribolt Hydron]]
|426666 credits
|200
|60
|none
|3000
|1000
|8000
|-
|[[File:Magmaticpyroclast.jpg|50x50px|link=Magmatic Pyroclast]]
|[[Magmatic Pyroclast]]
|1041666 credits
|250
|100
|[[Magma Technology]]
|5000
|1500
|12500
|-
|[[File:Quantum.jpg|50x50px|link=Pneumatron]]
|[[Pneumatron]]
|750 mirons;
found
|150
|45
|none;
[[Star of Talsia]]
|10000
|2000
|12000
|-
|[[File:Magtronicpowercell.jpg|50x50px]]
|[[Magtronic Power Cell]]
|200 mirons
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|[[File:Trueguardcell.jpg|50x50px]]
|[[True Guard Cell]]
|300 mirons
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|[[File:Hydroplasmonic.jpg|50x50px|link=Hydroplasmonic]]
|[[Hydroplasmonic]]
|found
|400
|50
|none
|15000
|5000
|12000
|}
